race.comment: WHATYOUTALKINBOUT (3) faded after leading them up last time out at this track and trip. He's a lightly raced gelding with plenty of upside and this presents as a good opportunity to go to the next level. Drawn slightly better this time and he can get back to winning ways. ETERNALLY YOURS (2) didn't handle the heavy deck last start after a good win over the mile two back at Albany. Nottle remains in the saddle and he's since joined the premier local barn. Wouldn't surprise to see him bounce back to winning ways with a firmer surface on offer. JUST SUBLIME (4) is racing well, missing narrowly in recent efforts. Back to 1400m now is a good move and it wouldn't surprise to see her sit closer in the run this time. Rates highly in this field. BONDI'S SON (11) is better than he's shown recently and can bounce back to form. BATISTA (1) is third-up and can improve quickly getting out in trip.
